titleStmt.title: SII 22.106: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 106. (A.R. No. 106 of 1906) SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT, TIRUKKŌYILŪR TALUK, JAMBAI. JAMBUNĀTHA TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL. ACHYUTADĒVA—Śaka 1552 (wrong for 1454)

summary.p: The date is given as Nandana, Karkaṭaka, śu. 10, Monday, Rōhiṇi perhaps corresponding to A.D. 1532, September 9, but the month was Kanyā.

This records an endowment, free of all taxes, of the village Ākkaippāḍi in Meykuṉṟa-nāḍu alias Narippari-nāḍu in Magadai-maṇḍalam on the southern bank of the Peṇṇai for the requirements of worship and offerings during the service instituted in the name of the king in the temple of Tāmtōṉṟi-Āḷuḍaiyanayiṉār at Śaṇbai, by Vaiyappa-Nāyakkar. Mention is made of the administration (of the division) by Venkaṭādri-Nāyakkar.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . cuvastti śrīmaṉmakāmaṇṭalecura metiṉi micurakaṇṭa
kaṭṭāri cāḷuva naraciṅkateva kumāra Accuttaiyatevamakā
irāyar piṟuti vi Irācciyam paṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa cakā
pttam 1000 5 100 5 10 2 Itaṉmel cellāniṉṟa naṉtaṉa caṅkvat
carattu kaṟkaṭaka nāyaṟṟu pūṟuvapakkiṣattu tecamiyum coma(ma)vāramum
peṟṟa tiruvoṇattu nāḷ peṇṇaivaṭakarai vā
ṇakoppāṭi nāṭṭil caṇpai Uṭaiyār tiruttām toṉṟi Āḷuṭaiya nayiṉāṟ
ku vaiyyappa nāyakkar Ayyaṉ cūkāmi Accuttaiyateva m(ā)kā Irāyar cantikku pūcai
nayivaittiyaṅkaḷ Uṇṭāṉa kaṭṭaḷaipaṭikku kuṟaivara naṭakkattakkatāka veṅkaṭā
ttiri nāyakkar Atikārattil Irāvutta nallūr cirmaiyil nāṭṭavar muṉpāka
viṭṭa peṇṇai teṉkarai makatai maṇṭalattu meykuṉṟa nāṭu Āṉa
narippari nāṭṭil Ākkaip paāṭi nañcai puñcai nāṟpāṟ kellaiyum
yiṉṉayiṉār kku caṉtirātittavaraiyum celvatāka caṟuva Aṉait tāyamum
Iṟaiyili Āka Inta Ūr kalveṭṭiviṭṭom Ivvūriṟku Ellai kiḻpāṟkel
lai cipāta nallūr Ellaikku meṟkkum teṉpāṟ kellai Arumpu
ṭaiyāṉpaṭṭu Ellaikkum māmāntūr Ellaikkum vaṭakku melpārk kellai
Ātanūr Ellaikku kiḻakku vaṭapāṟkkellai cuttamallikai Ellaikkum taṉmam
Iṭṭa nallūr Ellaikkum teṟkku yiṉṉānku Ellaikku Uḷpaṭṭatum Iṉṉa
yiṉāṟku Iṟaiyili Āka viṭṭom yinta taṉmuttukku Iyātoruvan Akutam paṇṇi
navan keṅkaikkaraiyil kārām pacuvaiyum taṉṉiṭaiya tāy takappaṉaiyum taṉ kuru
vaiyum koṉṟa pāvattile povāṉākavum
Digital edition of SII 22.106 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
